rulings.Case Title: FRANKLIN D AZAR et al VS. FREDERICK P FURTH et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER CCP 430.10(E) AND (G). PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO CLEARLY ALLEGE TERMS AND TYPE OF CONTRACT. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD WITH PARTICULARITY. OVERRULE AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 5 & 7. MOOT AS TO REMAINDER. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: FRANKLIN D AZAR et al VS. FREDERICK P FURTH et al
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1,2,3,6, & 9. UNDER JARROW, PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IMPLICATES THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE AND PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE A PRIMA FACIE CASE ON THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION DISMISSED AS SUPERFLUOUS UNDER HOOD. DENY AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4,5,7, & 8. (PB)
